visual_description: A man in a white shirt and striped tie stands in a hallway, looking ahead while another person is partially visible behind him. The scene shifts to a conference room where several men sit around a long table, some in black clothing, while a man in a white shirt stands near the doorway. A close-up shows an older man in a grey suit using chopsticks to eat from a bowl.
audio_description: Ambient chatter and the clinking of chopsticks are audible.
